# Kaisa Laga - AI-Powered Voice Reviews for Local Businesses

> Replace ignored surveys with 5-second voice reviews. 

Kaisa Laga is an internal early-warning system for local service businesses (salons, restaurants, clinics). 
Customers scan a QR code to leave a quick voice note. Our AI instantly turns it into operational insights for your dashboard. No typing. No apps. Just the truth.

## Why Voice?
Traditional surveys have a 2% completion rate because they feel like homework. Voice is effortless, and it contains the nuance that a simple rating strips away.

## How it works:
1. Place the QR Code: We mail you a premium acrylic display. Place it on your counter or tables.
2. Customers Speak: They scan and record a 5-second note. No app downloads required.
3. AI Synthesizes: You get a daily summary of sentiment, flagged issues, and operational alerts.

## Pricing:
- Starter: $49/month (1 Location, 500 voice reviews)
- Growth: $129/month (Up to 3 Locations, Unlimited reviews, Real-time SMS alerts)

## Privacy:
100% Private to Management. Kaisa Laga is not a public megaphone. Give angry customers a private channel to vent directly to you, so they don't take their frustration to Yelp.
